novel_features.name: Pattern Deck Export
novel_features.description: Build a design-crit deck for a pattern across an industry: searches matching screens, downloads full-res images from the Bytescale CDN, packages a zip with a manifest CSV.
novel_features.rationale: Chains search + Bytescale CDN URL translation + batch full-res download + manifest CSV. Mobbin's UI has no deck export.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces the 20-tab screenshot-and-rename loop designers do every crit week with one command and a reproducible artifact.

novel_features.name: Offline Pattern Bench
novel_features.description: Cross-app leaderboard for any pattern from the local store: count, last seen, top apps that ship it.
novel_features.rationale: Aggregates screens × patterns × apps in local SQLite. No Mobbin endpoint returns this shape.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Answers "who has shipped this pattern lately?" instantly without re-scrolling Mobbin's UI.

novel_features.name: Flow Audit with Delta
novel_features.description: Time-windowed flow audit across an industry: app, flow name, step count, captured_at — with --since support for delta-since-last-quarter reports.
novel_features.rationale: Joins synced flows × apps × industry × captured_at with --since. Mobbin's API exposes no time filter.
novel_features.example: mobbin-pp-cli audit onboarding --platform web --industry b2b-saas --since 60d --agent --select app,flow,step_count,captured_at
novel_features.why_it_matters: Quarterly onboarding/checkout/empty-state audits stop being a manual diff against last quarter's Notion doc.

novel_features.name: Version Drift Watch
novel_features.description: Diff an app's flows + screens between local snapshots; surface what changed (added/removed/screen count).
novel_features.rationale: Local app_versions snapshots over time. Mobbin's API exposes only current state — longitudinal diff is a local-store-only feature.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Tracks competitor product evolution. "What did Stripe ship since last month?" was unanswerable before.

novel_features.name: Batch Full-Res Grab
novel_features.description: Batch-download matching screens at 1920px from Bytescale with deterministic filenames and a manifest.json side-car for downstream tooling.
novel_features.rationale: Bytescale.mobbin.com URL translation + filename templating + manifest.json side-car. No tool batch-downloads with sensible filenames.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Replaces hand-dragging 20 PNGs into Finder. The manifest.json is what Figma/Storyboard plugins consume.

novel_features.name: Cross-Platform Parity
novel_features.description: Fan out a pattern query across web AND iOS for one app set; join results on app slug; output a side-by-side parity manifest.
novel_features.rationale: Two platform fan-outs joined on app slug locally. Mobbin's API is platform-scoped — cross-platform requires two calls + join.
novel_features.why_it_matters: Web product designers checking whether the iOS reference still matches the desktop pattern. The user's explicit dual-platform ask.

narrative.headline: Every Mobbin screen, flow, and pattern — searchable offline, deckable in one command, with longitudinal drift no Mobbin tool ships.
narrative.value_prop: Wraps Mobbin's curated library of shipped UI (web + mobile) with a local SQLite mirror, full-res batch downloads from the Bytescale CDN, and time-windowed audits across apps. Built for the Wednesday design crit and the quarterly onboarding audit. Uses your existing Chrome session via `auth login --chrome` — no extra API key, no paid MCP.
narrative.auth_narrative: Mobbin has no public API key. The CLI imports your logged-in Chrome cookies via pycookiecheat, cookies, or cookie-scoop-cli (one is required). Run `mobbin-pp-cli auth login --chrome` and the CLI handles the split Supabase JWT cookies (`sb-ujasntkfphywizsdaapi-auth-token.0` / `.1`) and refreshes them automatically. Free-tier sessions work for trending, discover, filters, and searchable apps; full content search and per-app HTML scraping need a Mobbin Pro session.

quickstart.comment: Import your logged-in Mobbin Chrome cookies (multi-profile aware)
Verify auth + reachability before anything else
Trending apps — public, works without auth; smoke-test the install
Discover category slugs before filtering search
Cross-app pattern search — the foundational deck-building call
One-shot design crit deck with full-res images + manifest CSV

troubleshoots.symptom: `auth login --chrome` says "No cookie extraction tool found"
troubleshoots.fix: Install one: `pip install pycookiecheat` (recommended), `brew install barnardb/cookies/cookies`, or `cargo install cookie-scoop-cli`.

troubleshoots.symptom: 401 after working for a few minutes
troubleshoots.fix: Supabase access token expired. Run `mobbin-pp-cli auth login --chrome` again to refresh; the daily-refresh fragility is a known Mobbin pattern.

troubleshoots.symptom: `screens search` returns empty or fewer results than expected
troubleshoots.fix: You may be on Mobbin's free tier (latest 4 apps only). `mobbin-pp-cli doctor` reports your plan. Upgrade to Pro at https://mobbin.com/pricing for full library access.

troubleshoots.symptom: `grab` or `deck` images are lower resolution than expected
troubleshoots.fix: Images are fetched full-width (1920px) from the Bytescale CDN as WebP; 1920px is the max Mobbin serves for these screens, so there is no higher-DPI flag.
Drift compares local snapshots over time. Run `mobbin-pp-cli sync <slug>` at least twice (separated by enough days) before expecting a diff.

narrative.when_to_use: Use this CLI when an agent needs to compose design-research workflows that go beyond "search and show." Reach for it for: batch downloading screens to a folder for downstream tooling; building cross-app pattern decks; running time-windowed audits ("every web SaaS onboarding from the last quarter"); or watching a competitor app for flow drift. It is intentionally web-first but iOS works on every command. The official Mobbin MCP exposes one search tool; this CLI exposes the full Mobbin surface plus six commands no Mobbin tool ships.

recipes.title: Wednesday paywall deck
recipes.explanation: Date-stamped zip with full-res PNGs and a manifest CSV — drag straight into Figma for the design crit.

recipes.title: Cross-platform pattern parity
recipes.explanation: Web + iOS in one fan-out; the join on app slug is what makes parity comparisons cheap.

recipes.title: Quarterly onboarding audit
recipes.command: mobbin-pp-cli audit onboarding --platform web --industry b2b-saas --since 90d --agent --select app,flow,step_count,captured_at
recipes.explanation: Returns only flows captured in the last 90 days, grouped by app — drop into a CSV diff to show your PM what's changed.

recipes.title: Narrow a verbose screen response
recipes.explanation: Screen-search payloads ship ~30 fields per row; `--select` with dotted paths keeps only the four agents actually need, cutting context burn ~85%.

recipes.title: Bench a pattern
recipes.explanation: Local-SQL aggregate: count of screens per app, latest captured_at. Answers "who's shipping checkout flows lately?" without re-scrolling Mobbin.

trigger_phrases: find empty states across web fintech
